parameters.query: SELECT id, first_name, last_name, mobile, email, last_exam_date FROM patients WHERE active=true AND ( (DATEDIFF(NOW(), last_exam_date) BETWEEN 360 AND 365) OR (DATEDIFF(NOW(), last_exam_date) BETWEEN 720 AND 725) ) AND opt_out_recall=false AND last_recall_sent < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

values.content: =You are a friendly UK-based optician's reception team. Generate a 1-sentence SMS to patient {{$json.first_name}} {{$json.last_name}}, telling them their last eye exam at Templeman Opticians (Rayleigh Essex) was {{$json.months_since_last}} months ago and inviting them to book online or call 01268 777729. Keep it warm, simple, under 160 chars (SMS limit). End with: 'Reply STOP to opt out.'

parameters.subject: Time for your next eye exam at Templeman Opticians
parameters.html:
=

Dear {{$json.first_name}},

It's been {{$json.months_since_last}} months since your last eye exam with us at Templeman Opticians.

The NHS recommends an eye exam every 2 years for adults under 70 (more often for over 70s, diabetics, or those with a family history of glaucoma).

Book online at templeman-opticians.com/book or call us on 01268 777729.

If you have mobility difficulties, we offer free NHS-funded home eye tests in your area.

Looking forward to seeing you.

Templeman Opticians
Rayleigh, Essex
01268 777729

parameters.query: UPDATE patients SET last_recall_sent = NOW(), recall_count = COALESCE(recall_count,0) + 1 WHERE id = {{$json.id}}

UPDATE patients 
SET last_recall_sent = NOW(),
    recall_count = COALESCE(recall_count, 0) + 1
WHERE id = '{{$json.id}}';

_meok_notes.purpose: Auto-recall patients due for 12-month or 24-month eye exam refresh
credentials_required: Postgres connection to PMS database (or convert to Optix/Acuity/whatever Templeman uses)
Anthropic Claude API key (for personalised SMS draft)
Twilio account with UK SMS sender
_meok_notes.expected_uplift: 15-30% recall rate vs zero automation = ~£8-20K/yr extra revenue
_meok_notes.GDPR_notes: Patient consent for recall comms must be on file. Opt-out tracked via 'opt_out_recall' column + STOP keyword via Twilio webhook.
